title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Tata CLiQ

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Tata CLiQ
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata CLiQ. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Tata CLiQ:
Tata CLiQ is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
